title: Bali Budget Backpacker
description: Discover Bali's iconic temples, emerald rice terraces, and spiritual soul without spending a fortune. Stay in stylish budget guesthouses in Ubud and Seminyak, explore the island on a scooter, and feast on delicious warung (local eatery) meals. Bali on a budget still means an extraordinary experience.
inclusions: 4 nights in clean, well-rated budget guesthouses with breakfast included
Daily breakfast at guesthouse
Ubud highlights day tour (Tegalalang Rice Terraces, Tirta Empul, Monkey Forest) by local driver
Sunset at Tanah Lot and Uluwatu Kecak dance shared tour
Airport transfers by shared shuttle
exclusions: International flights to/from Bali (Ngurah Rai Airport)
Personal expenses, tips, and scooter hire

days.title: Arrival in Bali – Seminyak Beach Evening
days.image: Seminyak Beach Bali sunset orange sky surfers silhouette calm evening
activities: Arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport; shared shuttle to Seminyak guesthouse
Afternoon: Walk along Seminyak Beach; browse Seminyak's trendy boutique shops on Jalan Laksmana
Evening: Sunset at Seminyak Beach from one of the free beachfront spots; cheap dinner at a Warung Babi Guling (roast pig stall)

days.title: Uluwatu – Clifftop Temple & Kecak Dance
days.image: Uluwatu Pura Luhur temple cliff edge sunset ocean Bali dramatic
activities: Morning: Visit Pura Luhur Uluwatu perched on a 70m cliff above the Indian Ocean; watch for cheeky monkeys
Afternoon: Relax at Padang Padang Beach or Bingin Beach (both near Uluwatu); warung seafood lunch
Sunset: Kecak Fire Dance performance at the Uluwatu Temple amphitheatre – a mesmerising ancient ritual

days.title: Ubud – Rice Terraces & Sacred Springs
days.image: Ubud Tegalalang Rice Terraces green stepped terraces palm trees morning
activities: 8 AM: Hire a local driver for the day (budget-friendly); visit Tegalalang Rice Terraces for sunrise photos
Midday: Explore Tirta Empul Holy Water Temple – watch Balinese purification rituals; lunch at a warung in Ubud
Afternoon: Visit Ubud Monkey Forest Sanctuary; browse Ubud Art Market for handmade Balinese crafts

days.title: Tanah Lot & Canggu Beach Day
days.image: Tanah Lot temple ocean rock island sunset Bali golden hour
activities: Morning: Canggu area – Echo Beach for surfing (lessons available cheaply); breakfast at a Canggu café
Midday: Visit Pura Tanah Lot at low tide – the iconic ocean temple on a rocky islet
Evening: Return to Seminyak; final dinner at a beachside warung with grilled fish and cold Bintang beer

days.title: Kuta & Departure
days.image: Kuta Beach Bali surf waves morning sunrise golden light
activities: Morning: Early surf lesson at Kuta Beach (very cheap, 1 hour with board and instructor)
Late morning: Browse Kuta's Beachwalk Mall for last-minute gifts and souvenirs
Afternoon: Shuttle transfer to Ngurah Rai International Airport for departure flight

title: Bali Family Paradise
description: Bali is a dream destination for families thanks to its gentle Hindu culture, warm people, and endless activities for all ages. Kids will love the Sacred Monkey Forest, water parks, rice terrace swings, and village craft workshops. Comfortable family resorts in Nusa Dua and Ubud ensure relaxation for parents too. A holiday everyone will remember.
inclusions: 5 nights in family-friendly 3-4 star resorts with pools (2 adults + 2 children)
Daily breakfast and 2 family dinners at resort restaurants
Bali Zoo entry with breakfast among orangutans package
Waterbom Bali water park entry for the whole family
Private air-conditioned car with family guide for all tours
exclusions: Indonesia visa-on-arrival fees for all family members
Lunches (except on island tours) and personal expenses

days.title: Arrival in Bali – Nusa Dua Resort
days.image: Nusa Dua Bali family resort beach calm water palm trees blue sky
activities: Arrive at Ngurah Rai Airport; private transfer to family resort in Nusa Dua
Afternoon: Settle in and enjoy the resort pool; children play on the safe, calm Nusa Dua beach
Evening: Welcome family dinner at the resort restaurant; watch a traditional Barong dance performance

days.title: Waterbom Bali – Water Park Fun
days.image: Waterbom Bali water slides family splash tropical garden fun
activities: Full day at Waterbom Bali in Kuta – Asia's top-rated water park with 20+ slides including family-friendly lazy river
Midday: Lunch at the park's restaurant (included in park entry)
Evening: Back to resort; early dinner and rest for the children

days.title: Ubud – Monkey Forest & Cooking Class
days.image: Ubud Sacred Monkey Forest family children feeding long-tailed macaque
activities: Morning: Drive to Ubud; visit the Sacred Monkey Forest Sanctuary – kids adore the playful long-tailed macaques
Midday: Family Balinese cooking class at a Ubud school (learn to make Nasi Goreng and Satay)
Afternoon: Visit Tegalalang Rice Terraces and try the famous rice terrace swing; browse the Ubud Art Market

days.title: Bali Zoo & Tirta Empul Temple
days.image: Bali Zoo orangutan breakfast family wildlife close up jungle
activities: Morning: Bali Zoo's 'Breakfast with Orangutans' experience – eat alongside rescued orangutans
Midday: Visit Tirta Empul Holy Spring Temple; watch the purification ceremony from the viewing area
Afternoon: Drive through the scenic Kintamani volcano area; see Mount Batur from the rim viewpoint

days.title: Tanah Lot & Seminyak Beach
days.image: Tanah Lot Bali family watching temple sunset ocean dramatic sky
activities: Morning: Explore Tanah Lot Temple complex with the family; browse the extensive souvenir market
Afternoon: Seminyak Beach – safe swimming areas, sandcastle building, and beachside lunch
Evening: Farewell family dinner at a beachfront restaurant with fire dancing entertainment

days.title: Sanur Beach & Departure
days.image: Sanur Beach Bali calm shallow water morning gentle waves kids paddling
activities: Morning: Calm and family-friendly Sanur Beach – ideal for young children as waves are gentle inside the reef
Late morning: Visit the Bali Museum in Denpasar to understand Balinese history and art
Afternoon: Transfer to Ngurah Rai Airport for departure flight

title: Bali Romantic Bliss
description: Bali is the world's most romantic island, and this honeymoon package captures its essence perfectly. Wake up in a cliff-edge villa overlooking the Indian Ocean, watch sunrise from a rice terrace, bathe in holy springs, and dine under a canopy of stars. From Ubud's spiritual serenity to Seminyak's glamorous sunsets, love is in every moment.
inclusions: 5 nights in boutique romantic villas and cliff resorts (private pool villa with honeymoon décor)
Daily champagne breakfast in villa and 3 romantic candlelit dinners
Couples' Bali traditional spa massage (2 hours) with flower bath ritual
Private sunrise tour to Mount Batur and Tirta Empul for purification
All private air-conditioned transfers and a private driver for the duration
exclusions: Spa upgrades and personal expenses beyond inclusions

days.title: Arrival in Bali – Seminyak Villa Luxury
days.image: Seminyak Bali private pool villa couple evening lights frangipani flowers
activities: Arrive at Ngurah Rai Airport; private transfer to a boutique pool villa in Seminyak
Afternoon: Private villa welcome with flower petals, champagne, and fruit platter; rest and freshen up
Evening: Sunset cocktails at Ku De Ta or Potato Head Beach Club; romantic dinner at Sarong restaurant Seminyak

days.title: Uluwatu Cliffs & Kecak Dance Romance
days.image: Uluwatu cliff Bali couple sunset ocean breeze temple fire dance orange sky
activities: Morning: Coastal drive to Uluwatu; walk along the clifftop path to Pura Luhur Uluwatu temple
Afternoon: Private surfing lesson at Padang Padang beach; post-surf fresh coconut and seafood lunch at Ulu Cliffhouse
Sunset: Front-row couple seats at the Uluwatu Kecak Fire Dance; dinner at a clifftop seafood grill with ocean views

days.title: Ubud – Spiritual Heart of Bali
days.image: Ubud rice fields couple walking path sunrise morning golden light
activities: Morning: Private driver to Ubud; sunrise walk through Campuhan Ridge with valley views
Midday: Spa ritual at COMO Shambhala Estate – couples' Balinese massage with herbal compress and flower bath
Afternoon: Visit Tirta Empul for a couple's purification ritual; explore the Ubud Royal Palace at dusk

days.title: Mount Batur Sunrise Trek
days.image: Mount Batur volcano Bali sunrise trekkers summit crater lake couple morning
activities: 2 AM: Depart for Mount Batur; guided trek in darkness with torches (2 hours to the summit)
5:30 AM: Watch the sunrise over the crater lake and Mount Agung from the caldera rim – a spiritual and breathtaking moment
Return to Ubud villa for a late breakfast; afternoon free for rest, shopping, or optional cooking class

days.title: Nusa Penida – Island Paradise
days.image: Nusa Penida Kelingking Beach dinosaur cliff T-Rex head turquoise water couple
activities: 7 AM: Fast boat from Sanur to Nusa Penida (30 min); jeep tour to Kelingking Beach viewpoint (iconic T-Rex cliff)
Midday: Visit Angel Billabong and Broken Beach – natural infinity pool carved by the sea; packed lunch on the rocks
Afternoon: Snorkelling with manta rays at Manta Point; return fast boat to Bali; romantic farewell dinner at the villa

days.title: Tanah Lot & Departure
days.image: Tanah Lot Bali ocean temple sunrise soft light couple walk
activities: Morning: Visit Tanah Lot at sunrise before the crowds; walk the coastal path hand in hand
Late morning: Leisurely breakfast at a cliffside café overlooking the ocean
Afternoon: Final villa time and check-out; private transfer to Ngurah Rai Airport for departure

title: Bali Active Adventure
description: Bali isn't just temples and sunsets – it's one of Southeast Asia's premier adventure destinations. Trek to the summit of an active volcano before dawn, white-water raft the roaring Ayung River, surf world-class breaks in Uluwatu, dive vibrant coral gardens off Nusa Penida, and mountain bike through jungle villages. An adrenaline rush in paradise.
inclusions: 5 nights in adventure guesthouses and eco-lodges near activity centres
Daily breakfast and packed lunches on trekking and rafting days
Mount Batur pre-dawn summit trek with certified guide
Ayung River white-water rafting (Grade 2-3, 2 hours) with gear provided
Nusa Penida snorkelling with manta rays by fast boat
exclusions: Personal adventure gear beyond provisions; travel insurance (mandatory – strongly recommended)

days.title: Arrival & Surfing at Kuta
days.image: Kuta Beach Bali surfer riding wave sunset beginner lesson fun
activities: Arrive at Ngurah Rai Airport; transfer to a surf hostel in Kuta or Seminyak
Afternoon: 2-hour beginner surf lesson at Kuta Beach with a local surf instructor
Evening: Gear up with your guide for the coming week's adventures; dinner at a Warung on Legian Street

days.title: Mount Batur – Volcano Summit Trek
days.image: Mount Batur summit dawn active volcano crater lake Bali trekkers
activities: 1:30 AM: Transfer to Toya Bungkah village; begin 2-hour guided night trek to Mount Batur summit (1,717m)
5:30 AM: Watch a spectacular sunrise over the volcanic crater and Lake Batur; cook eggs in volcanic steam vents
Midday: Descend and soak in Toya Bungkah natural hot springs; return to base for a late lunch and rest

days.title: Ayung River White-Water Rafting
days.image: Ayung River Bali rafting green jungle gorge rapids white water group
activities: Morning: Drive to Ubud area; briefing and gear up for Ayung River rafting (25 rapids over 9 km through lush gorge)
Midday: Post-raft lunch at a riverside jungle restaurant
Afternoon: Mountain biking through Ubud's rice fields and traditional villages; visit an organic coffee and spice plantation

days.title: Nusa Penida – Snorkelling & Cliffs
days.image: Nusa Penida manta ray snorkelling underwater blue water clear Bali
activities: 6:30 AM: Fast boat from Sanur to Nusa Penida; jeep to Kelingking Beach for the iconic cliff viewpoint
Midday: Snorkelling at Crystal Bay and Manta Point – spot manta rays, turtles, and colourful reef fish
Afternoon: Visit Angel Billabong natural pool; return to Bali by fast boat; evening at Canggu

days.title: Uluwatu – Surfing & Cliff Jumping
days.image: Uluwatu surf break reef wave barrel ride sunset Bali surfer
activities: Morning: Surfing session at Uluwatu's famous reef break (intermediate level recommended)
Midday: Cliff jumping at a hidden cove near Nyang Nyang Beach with a guide
Afternoon: Canyoning through the Green Canyon at Kemenuh waterfall near Gianyar; sunset from the clifftop

days.title: Canggu Beach Day & Departure
days.image: Canggu Echo Beach Bali surf watch morning breakfast café cool
activities: Morning: Yoga class on the beach at Canggu (popular with the adventure crowd); final surf at Echo Beach
Late morning: Brunch at a Canggu hipster café; last-minute shopping at the Canggu market
Afternoon: Transfer to Ngurah Rai Airport for departure flight

title: Bali Luxury Sanctuary
description: Experience Bali at the absolute pinnacle of luxury. Stay in a private cliff-edge villa in Uluwatu, a jungle retreat in Ubud, and a beachfront ocean villa in Seminyak – all with private plunge pools and dedicated butlers. Enjoy exclusive temple tours, private cooking classes with master chefs, and world-class wellness rituals. This is Bali reimagined.
inclusions: 6 nights in 5-star private pool villas (butler service, daily room décor, minibar included)
All breakfasts, 3 gourmet lunches, and 5 fine dining dinners (including one private beach dinner)
Private car and dedicated English-speaking guide for the entire trip
Nusa Penida private speedboat charter with butler-prepared picnic lunch
Daily 90-minute couples spa treatment at top Bali spas (Four Seasons, COMO, or Aman standard)
exclusions: Additional spa and wellness treatments beyond the daily inclusion

days.title: Arrival – Uluwatu Clifftop Villa
days.image: Uluwatu Bali luxury cliff villa private pool infinity ocean Indian Ocean sunset
activities: Private airport transfer to a clifftop luxury villa in Uluwatu with panoramic Indian Ocean views
Afternoon: Villa welcome – floral bath, welcome cocktail, and butler orientation; rest in the private infinity pool
Evening: Exclusive private Kecak Fire Dance viewing with front-row reserved seats; dinner at a fine clifftop restaurant

days.title: Uluwatu – Beaches & Yoga Ritual
days.image: Uluwatu Bali private beach yoga session sunrise cliff morning peaceful
activities: Dawn: Private sunrise yoga session on the villa cliff deck with an Ubud-trained instructor
Morning: Snorkelling at the pristine Blue Point Beach (Suluban); fresh seafood brunch at Ulu Cliffhouse
Afternoon: 90-minute Balinese boreh herbal scrub and massage at the villa spa; sunset cocktails on the terrace

days.title: Drive to Ubud – Jungle Retreat
days.image: Ubud jungle villa Bali river gorge private plunge pool lush tropical morning
activities: Morning: Scenic drive to Ubud through volcanic highland roads and rice fields; check in to a river gorge jungle villa
Afternoon: Private guided tour of Pura Gunung Kawi – ancient 11th-century royal tombs carved into rock faces
Evening: Exclusive Royal Ubud dinner experience with authentic Bebek Betutu (slow-roasted duck) and gamelan music

days.title: Ubud – Ceremony, Cooking & Sacred Water
days.image: Tirta Empul Holy Spring Ubud Bali purification ritual sacred pool morning flowers
activities: Morning: Private guided Hindu purification ritual at Tirta Empul Holy Spring with a Balinese priest blessing
Midday: Private culinary masterclass with a celebrated Ubud chef in a Balinese pavilion kitchen
Afternoon: 90-minute four-hand Balinese massage at COMO Shambhala; evening at leisure in Ubud town

days.title: Nusa Penida – Private Island Escape
days.image: Nusa Penida private beach picnic white sand blue water secluded Bali
activities: 7 AM: Private speedboat from Sanur to Nusa Penida; exclusive jeep tour of the island
Midday: Butler-served private picnic lunch on a secluded beach near Atuh Beach
Afternoon: Snorkelling with manta rays at Manta Bay; sunset cruise back to Bali by private boat

days.title: Seminyak – Luxury Beach Villa & Fine Dining
days.image: Seminyak Bali beachfront villa pool sunset golden hour cocktails elegant
activities: Morning: Private transfer to an oceanfront pool villa in Seminyak; complimentary room upgrade and amenities
Afternoon: Personal shopping with a private stylist along Jalan Petitenget's luxury boutiques
Evening: Private beach dinner set-up with candlelight, floral décor, and a personalised menu prepared by the villa chef

days.title: Tanah Lot Sunrise & Departure
days.image: Tanah Lot Bali sunrise golden mist temple rock island dawn peaceful
activities: Dawn: Private sunrise visit to Tanah Lot before it opens to the public – a magical and serene experience
Morning: Last villa breakfast; 90-minute farewell spa ritual (traditional Lulur body treatment)
Afternoon: Private transfer to Ngurah Rai Airport for departure flight

title: Bali Spiritual & Cultural Discovery
description: Bali's Hindu culture is one of the world's most vibrant and visually spectacular. This itinerary immerses you in daily ceremonies at ancient temples, the mesmerising Kecak Fire Dance, sacred purification rituals at holy springs, and traditional Balinese crafts passed down through generations. Return home with a deeper understanding of the Island of the Gods.
inclusions: 4 nights in culturally positioned guesthouses and heritage homestays
Daily breakfast and 2 traditional Balinese meals (ceremony-style)
Full-day guided temple circuit (Besakih, Kintamani, Tirta Empul) with historian
Balinese offerings-making and Legong dance class with local artists
Private driver and cultural expert guide for all tours
exclusions: Personal expenses, tips, and optional temple donations

days.title: Arrival – Ubud, the Cultural Capital
days.image: Ubud Bali Royal Palace stone carvings demon gate evening gamelan
activities: Arrive at Ngurah Rai Airport; private transfer to a heritage homestay in Ubud
Afternoon: Visit the Ubud Royal Palace and the Museum Puri Lukisan – Bali's first fine arts museum
Evening: Watch a Legong or Barong dance performance at the Ubud Palace open-air stage

days.title: Full-Day Temple Circuit – Besakih & Kintamani
days.image: Besakih Mother Temple Bali misty volcano Agung grand staircase worshippers
activities: 7 AM: Early departure to Pura Besakih – Bali's Mother Temple on the slopes of Mount Agung; observe morning prayers
Midday: Drive to Kintamani plateau; lunch overlooking Mount Batur volcano and caldera lake
Afternoon: Visit Tirta Empul holy springs for a guided cultural explanation of the Hindu purification rites

days.title: Ubud – Crafts, Offerings & Sacred Monkey Forest
days.image: Ubud Bali woodcarving workshop artisan traditional Balinese craft village
activities: Morning: Workshop in traditional Balinese offering-making (Canang Sari) with a local ibu (woman elder)
Midday: Cycle through Mas village – Bali's woodcarving centre; visit a silversmith in Celuk village
Afternoon: Walk the Sacred Monkey Forest; visit Pura Dalem Agung temple within the forest

days.title: Uluwatu – Ancient Sea Temple & Dance
days.image: Uluwatu Bali Kecak fire dance sunset priests amphitheatre ocean backdrop
activities: Morning: Drive to Pura Goa Lawah (Bat Cave Temple) near Kusamba; observe devotees and hundreds of bats
Midday: Visit Pura Ulun Danu Bratan – the beautiful lake temple at Bedugul surrounded by water and mist
Sunset: Attend the Kecak Fire Dance at Uluwatu – 150 performers chanting and re-enacting the Ramayana epic

days.title: Tanah Lot & Departure
days.image: Tanah Lot Bali sea temple worshippers ceremony morning tide dramatic
activities: Morning: Visit Pura Tanah Lot at low tide – walk across the tidal flat to see the snake guardian shrine
Late morning: Watch morning prayers and offerings at the temple; visit the adjacent Pura Batu Bolong
Afternoon: Transfer to Ngurah Rai Airport for departure; carry home a handmade Balinese carving as a memento

title: Bali Weekend Escape
description: Short on time but craving Bali? This perfectly crafted 4-day getaway squeezes in the absolute best of the island – lush rice terraces, cliffside temples, a volcano sunrise, and a relaxing beach evening. Fly in Thursday night and be back Monday morning feeling completely renewed. Bali's magic works even on a long weekend.
inclusions: 3 nights in comfortable 3-star hotels (Ubud and Seminyak)
Daily breakfast
Mount Batur sunrise trek with certified guide and breakfast at the summit
Ubud highlights guided tour (Tegalalang, Tirta Empul, Monkey Forest)
Airport transfers and inter-city private transfers
exclusions: Personal expenses, tips, and optional spa

days.title: Arrival in Ubud – Monkey Forest & Rice Terraces
days.image: Ubud Tegalalang Rice Terraces green Bali landscape morning coconut trees
activities: Arrive at Ngurah Rai Airport (afternoon/evening); private transfer to Ubud hotel (1.5 hours)
Early evening: Walk through the Ubud Monkey Forest at golden hour; explore the small lanes of Ubud centre
Dinner: Rooftop warung in Ubud with valley view and local Balinese dishes

days.title: Mount Batur Volcano Sunrise Trek
days.image: Mount Batur Bali sunrise summit volcano crater couple trekkers dawn
activities: 1:30 AM: Hotel pick-up; drive to trekking base at Toya Bungkah; begin 2-hour guided summit trek
5:30 AM: Sunrise from the rim of Mount Batur – watch the sky turn gold over Mount Agung and the lake
Morning: Return to Ubud; visit Tirta Empul Temple and Tegalalang Rice Terraces before a late lunch

days.title: Uluwatu & Seminyak Beach
days.image: Uluwatu cliff temple sunset Bali monkey ocean dramatic rocks evening
activities: Morning: Drive to Uluwatu; visit Pura Luhur Uluwatu clifftop temple and walk the scenic coastal path
Midday: Lunch at a cliffside warung with ocean views; afternoon at Seminyak Beach
Sunset: Sunset drinks at Ku De Ta or Potato Head Beach Club; transfer to Seminyak hotel

days.title: Tanah Lot & Departure
days.image: Tanah Lot Bali ocean temple morning peaceful water reflection sky
activities: Morning: Sunrise at Tanah Lot temple before the crowds arrive; coastal walk along the clifftop path
Late morning: Browse Seminyak's local market for last-minute Bali gifts and sarongs
Afternoon: Transfer to Ngurah Rai Airport for departure flight
